acts.label: THE PUSH
acts.why: Captures the hypnotic trance rhythm of the Drop where vocal stutters and bass peaks demand

acts.label: SLOW BREATH
acts.why: Marks the Bridge/Slowdown section where tension builds through whispered vocals and stutte

acts.label: FINAL CRUSH
acts.why: The ultimate culmination of desire in the second chorus/loop where energy returns to a pea
